case_title: ERIN ELLIS et al VS. SUSANNA SHAW et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN OPPOSITION TO DEFT'S DEMURRER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERRY, NICHOLAS

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT SUSANNA SHAW'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 501 TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY ON THE SAME DATE AT 9:30 AM. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT SUSANNA SHAW'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 501 TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY ON THE SAME DATE AT 9:30 AM. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT SUSANNA SHAW'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS 1) SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CODORO TO ALLEGE CAUSATION AND DAMAGES; AND 2) SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE BREACHED CONTRACT PROVISION. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. SMITH, NOT REPORTED

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT SUSANNA SHAW'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFFS' COMPLAINT WAS HEARD AND TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS TO THE CASUSE OF ACTION RE: SFRO 37.9. COURT GRANTS DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER AND MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFFS' COMPLAINT (SEE ORDER FOR COMPLETE DETAILS). JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY (D501)

COMPLEX LITIGATION CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-06-2012 HELD AND CONTINUED TO OCT-22-2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 305, UPON STIPULATION OF COUNSEL. NOTICE WAIVED. JUDGE: JOHN E. MUNTER; CLERK: CRAIG BLACKSTONE; REPORTER: LORETTA NAJERA (DEPT. 305).

Off Calendar Jul-24-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SUSANNA SHAW'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Transferred to Department 501 to be heard by Judge Quidachay on the same date at 9:30 am. Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-24-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SUSANNA SHAW'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Transferred to Department 501 to be heard by Judge Quidachay on the same date at 9:30 am. Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Defendant Susanna Shaw'S Demurrer To Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-24-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Toal (415-438-6690)of Lewis Brisbois for Susanna Shaw, defendant and moving party / Jaymee Sagasi (415-773-1240 x302) of Greenstein & McDonald for Erin Ellis, plaintiff and opposing party

ARGUED - The tentative ruling is adopted as follows: Defendant Susanna Shaw'S Demurrer To Complaint is 1) Sustained with leave to amend as to CODORO to allege causation and damages; and 2) Sustained with leave to amend to allege breached contract provision. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (D501)

Defendant Susanna Shaw'S Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs' Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-06-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Toal (415-438-6690)of Lewis Brisbois for Susanna Shaw, defendant and moving party / Jaymee Sagasi (415-773-1240 x302) of Greenstein & McDonald for Erin Ellis, plaintiff and opposing party

ARGUED - The tentative ruling is adopted as follows: Defendant Susanna Shaw'S Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs' Complaint is 1) Moot as to CODORO; and the Cout takes under submission 2) granting with leave to amend as to San Francisco Rent Ordinance 37.9. Plaintiff to submit proposed order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (D501)
